templates.body:
PROCESS CHANGE · [Business]
Old way: _______________
New way: _______________
Start date: _______________
Why now (one paragraph): _______________

Next: structured engagement assignment for tenured staff (see change-engagement-assign).

CHANGE ENGAGEMENT ASSIGNMENT
Employee: _______________  Due: _______________

1. Read assigned short change reflection (paid work time: ___ hours).
2. Written report (1-2 pages): What changed for you? What is hard? What would help?
3. Present to: [ ] supervisor 1:1  [ ] team (10-15 min)

Submit report by due date. Schedule presentation within 3 days after.

PRIVATE 1:1 (not in team meeting)

"This is not optional busywork. The process is changing on [date]. The assignment is how we make sure your experience counts and we fix what we can before go-live.

I need your report and a short presentation. If there is a real blocker, put it in writing. If the answer is only 'I don't want to,' we need to talk about fit and next steps."

Document: agreed Y/N  follow-up date: _______

REPORT LOG
Employee: _______________  Submitted: _______________
Presentation: 1:1 / team  Date: _______________

Actionable blockers from report:
1. _______________
2. _______________

Veteran peer-trainer candidate (Y/N): ___

PEER TRAINER ASK

"Your report showed you understand the new flow. I want you to pair with [name] for two shifts on [process]. You keep tribal knowledge; we get adoption. Extra: [recognition/hours]."

OBSERVATION NOTE
Employee: _______________  Date: _______________
Official process followed (Y/N): ___
Old workaround observed (Y/N): ___
Evidence: _______________

Next: second 1:1 → HR path if repeat.

HR ESCALATION PACKET
Employee: _______________
Change: _______________
Engagement assigned: Y  Refusal date: _______________
1:1 documented: Y
Reports submitted: N

Request: HR-aligned next step per handbook.

30-DAY CHANGE CHECK
Process: _______________
Veteran staff on new way (Y/N): ___
Old workaround still seen (Y/N): ___
Adjust training / escalate: _______________
